bb-fade: position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15,23,30,0) 35%, var(--canvas) 100%);
play-btn: flex: 1; height: 50px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--blue); color: #0F171E; font-family: var(--font); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2px; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,168,225,0.32);
wl-btn: flex: 1; height: 50px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); color: #fff; font-family: var(--font); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
xray-head: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px;
xray-label: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; color: var(--text-secondary);
cast-name: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
cast-role: font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
row-head: display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; padding-right: 16px; margin-bottom: 10px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; gap: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
